summary: Gesture Collision Fix - All 5 features verified working. Quick tap (<500ms) triggers instant Shaka like, Long press (>=500ms) opens reaction picker menu, menu stays open after release, closes on emoji select or tap outside.
critical_code_review_comments: Feed.js lines 377-378: touchStartTimeRef and longPressTriggeredRef properly track press duration using Date.now()
Feed.js lines 380-393: handleShakaPointerDown correctly starts timer at 500ms for long press detection
Feed.js lines 396-420: handleShakaPointerUp properly distinguishes quick tap (< 500ms → handleLike) vs long press (timer fired → menu opens)
Feed.js lines 407-409: Key fix - if longPressTriggeredRef.current is true, function returns early so menu STAYS OPEN after finger release
Feed.js lines 125-135: ReactionOverlay component correctly handles tap-outside-to-close behavior
context_for_next_testing_agent: Gesture collision fix verified working. All 5 behaviors tested via Playwright: quick tap toggles like, long press opens menu, menu stays open after release, closes on emoji select, closes on outside tap.

quick_tap_shaka_like.description: Quick tap (<500ms) triggers instant Shaka like without opening menu

long_press_reaction_menu.description: Long press (>=500ms) opens reaction picker menu with 4 emojis (👍🌊❤️🔥)

menu_stays_open_after_release.description: Reaction menu STAYS OPEN after finger/mouse release - does not auto-close

menu_closes_on_emoji_select.description: Menu closes when an emoji is selected (e.g., clicking 🔥)

menu_closes_on_tap_outside.description: Menu closes when tapping outside (overlay click)

test_methodology.quick_tap_test: Single click on like button, verified no reaction picker appeared
test_methodology.long_press_test: Mouse down → wait 600ms → mouse up, verified reaction picker appeared
test_methodology.menu_stays_open_test: After long press release, waited 500ms and verified picker still visible
test_methodology.close_on_select_test: Clicked fire emoji, verified picker disappeared
test_methodology.close_on_outside_test: Long pressed to open menu, clicked body at (50,50), verified picker disappeared
